_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. config.json is gitignored.

credentials._comment: Use token OR username+password. Token takes priority if both are set. Leave fields blank to be prompted at runtime.

_workspace_options_reference._comment: Optional fields you can add to any workspace entry:
_workspace_options_reference.base_url: overrides the global base_url for this workspace — use this to point to a different Cribl cluster
_workspace_options_reference.routes_table: route table name used in GET/PATCH /routes/{routes_table} — defaults to "default" if omitted
_workspace_options_reference.skip_ssl: true/false — overrides global skip_ssl for this workspace only
_workspace_options_reference.require_allow: true — forces the user to type ALLOW before any writes
_workspace_options_reference.route_template: path to a per-workspace route template override (skips region lookup)
_workspace_options_reference.dest_template: path to a per-workspace dest template override (skips region lookup)
_workspace_options_reference.description: human-readable label shown in the TARGET banner
